The '''Battle of Foerost''' was the opening battle of the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==The battle==
In a surprise attack, [[Revan/Legends|Revan's]] fleet, swept into the [[Foerost/Legends|Foerost]] system. Quickly overcoming the unprepared defenses, Revan and Malak announced to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that they were the new [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]], and captured the majority of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Fleet]] based in the drydocks around Foerost, dealing a crippling blow to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

{{Battle-stub}}
